heroImage.title: AI Luxury Platform for Real Estate, Hospitality & Lifestyle Ventures
heroImage.lead: Chorn Planet turns premium places, services, and lifestyle brands into AI-native business ecosystems.
heroImage.support: Built for real estate companies, hospitality ventures, tourism destinations, mixed-use projects, and premium service businesses that need more than a website, campaign, or digital catalog.

readinessImage.alt: Luxury future city architecture platform shown on a premium display with planning and AI readiness visuals

ventureImage.alt: Venture-ready AI luxury business platform signal for premium collaborators

readinessSection.title: Not only luxury visuals. A platform direction for premium business operations.
paragraphs: AI Luxury is the intelligent connection between premium brand identity, destination experience, customer service, digital commerce, operational workflows, and AI-powered decision support.
The goal is to make luxury business more intelligent, more experiential, and more scalable - while keeping the customer experience calm, refined, and human.

segmentsSection.title: Designed for high-value places, services, and ventures.

layersSection.title: AI-native capability areas for premium business growth.
layersSection.lead: Each layer is designed to support real customer journeys, service teams, commerce flows, and long-term ecosystem expansion.

businessSignalSection.title: A concrete signal that Chorn Planet can build and deliver AI-native luxury platforms.
businessSignalSection.lead: This page positions AI Luxury as a premium business layer: useful for real estate companies, venture collaborators, destination owners, and hospitality operators who need a future-ready digital foundation.

premiumSegments.title: Real Estate & Mixed-use Projects
premiumSegments.text: Create intelligent destination platforms for residential, commercial, tourism, and lifestyle developments that need a stronger digital ecosystem layer.

premiumSegments.text: Connect guest journeys, service workflows, content, booking, commerce, and AI-assisted operations into one premium service experience.

premiumSegments.title: Tourism & Destination Branding
premiumSegments.text: Build digital destination layers that make premium places easier to discover, experience, operate, and scale across media and customer touchpoints.

premiumSegments.title: Luxury Lifestyle Commerce

platformLayers.text: Create a platform base that can expand into SaaS, destination systems, hospitality tools, analytics, and smart city experiences.
